beats.speaker: ENV
beats.text: The two materials bind cleanly. A pale green salve with a faintly luminescent edge. Not dangerous. Not inert. Something in between.

topics.prompt: Ask him to teach you Infernal Meditation

opening_beats.speaker: 0006_WTCH
opening_beats.text: You are asking me for the right reason or you would not have made it this far. Sit down.

opening_beats.speaker: 0006_WTCH
opening_beats.text: I lost a wife and a daughter. Both in Sulphera. Not to the rings — to the time between entries. The technique I will teach you was not born from spiritual ambition. It was born from grief and it is sustained by something that is not grief but is adjacent to it.

opening_beats.speaker: 0006_WTCH
opening_beats.text: I go to the Visitor's Ring on certain days. I sit in the space that holds the dead who left things unfinished. It is not a comfortable space. It is the only one I have.

beats.speaker: 0006_WTCH
beats.text: Nine rings. The outer eight are organised by the sins that give them their texture. The ninth is innermost — the Royal Ring. Most people never know it exists. Asmodeus guards the passage between the Lust Ring and it. You will not pass without his approval.

beats.speaker: 0006_WTCH
beats.text: What gets you through the outer rings is pure desire. Not ambition — desire. Ambition is desire pointed at a goal. Pure desire is desire pointed at the thing itself, without strategy. The rings read this with more precision than you will be comfortable with.
